```js
await (async (page) => { const routes=['/','/login','/register','/auth/login','/auth/register','/pricing','/community','/docs','/legal/privacy','/legal/terms','/all-pages']; const results=[]; for (const route of routes){ const url='https://thenewfuse.com'+route; const failed=[]; const pageErrors=[]; const reqFail=(req)=>failed.push({url:req.url(),failure:req.failure()?.errorText||'failed'}); const cErr=(msg)=>{ if(msg.type()==='error') pageErrors.push(msg.text()); }; page.on('requestfailed', reqFail); page.on('console', cErr); const t0=Date.now(); try { const resp=await page.goto(url,{waitUntil:'domcontentloaded',timeout:20000}); await page.waitForTimeout(900); const h1=await page.locator('h1').first().textContent().catch(()=>null); const signInCount=await page.locator('a:has-text("Sign In")').count().catch(()=>0); const getStartedCount=await page.locator('a:has-text("Get Started")').count().catch(()=>0); results.push({route,finalUrl:page.url(),httpStatus:resp?resp.status():null,loadMs:Date.now()-t0,h1:h1?h1.trim():null,signInCount,getStartedCount,failedRequests:[...failed],consoleErrors:[...new Set(pageErrors)]}); } catch(e){ results.push({route,status:'error',error:String(e),loadMs:Date.now()-t0,failedRequests:[...failed],consoleErrors:[...new Set(pageErrors)]}); } page.off('requestfailed', reqFail); page.off('console', cErr); } return results; })(page);
```
